description: Common rule engine rules (theme-specific gauge/climax rules are defined in each theme JSON)

pre_generation.removed_entity: The following entities have been removed and MUST NOT reappear: {entities}
pre_generation.mood_repeat: The last {count} scenes all had mood '{mood}'. You MUST switch to a different mood.
pre_generation.hook_resolve: It is time to resolve an unresolved plot hook. Incorporate this into the story: '{hook}'

validation.removed_entity_violation: '{name}' has been removed but appeared in the new scene. Remove this entity or mention only as flashback/memory.
validation.resolved_event_warning: '{event}' has already been resolved. Do not describe it as newly discovered.
validation.mood_repeat_warning: Mood '{mood}' is repeating consecutively. Try a different mood.
validation.min_choices_warning: Fewer than 2 choices provided. Include at least 2 choices.

retry.violation_header: ### CRITICAL: The previous generation violated the following rules. You MUST fix them. ###
